hero.sub: Operating on-premise infrastructure and building factory ERP systems

about.label: ABOUT ME
body1: for a 230-person manufacturing site — I built the company's entire tech stack from
: server infrastructure, networking, security, and in-house ERP software.
body2: Using open-source tools and AI to ship

body2.text: reliable systems on a near-zero budget

body2: — production scheduling, inventory, and quality control.

bullets: Built the company's on-premise infrastructure from scratch on two repurposed desktops — a Proxmox VE + PBS cluster running 7+ virtualized services (NAS, reverse proxy, DNS, VPN, monitoring) with automated nightly backups and near-100% uptime.
Redesigned the factory network for ~230 staff and 60+ devices: dual-WAN load-balancing + failover, a structured /24 IP plan, and WireGuard / Tailscale remote access.

Cut recurring IT costs ~45,000฿/year by self-hosting open-source replacements (OpenMediaVault, Wazuh + Defender), and automated daily ops for 50 workstations with PowerShell + RMM into centralized dashboards.

jobs.role: B.Sc. Information Technology · Faculty of Science
bullets: Thesis: NFC Deck Tracker — a Flutter mobile app for real-time trading card game deck management using NFC tags, built on Clean Architecture with Firebase backend.

skills.name: Proxmox
skills.desc: Open-source virtualization platform managing a Proxmox VE + PBS cluster — 7+ services including NAS, reverse proxy, DNS, VPN, and monitoring on bare-metal hardware.

skills.name: Docker
skills.desc: Containerizes all self-hosted services for consistent, isolated deployments across the Proxmox cluster and development environments.

skills.name: Linux
skills.desc: Server OS for every on-premise service — Ubuntu Server, systemd administration, CLI scripting, and service management.

skills.name: Cloudflare
skills.desc: DNS, CDN, and Zero Trust tunnels — exposes self-hosted services securely to the internet without opening inbound ports.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.desc: Primary language for all web and API projects — type-safe, scales cleanly to larger codebases, and eliminates a whole class of runtime errors.

skills.name: Next.js
skills.desc: React framework with server-side rendering and file-based routing — used for ERP operator interfaces and internal dashboards.

skills.name: React
skills.desc: Component-based UI library for building stateful operator-facing interfaces and management dashboards.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.desc: Primary relational database for ERP data — production records, BOM, inventory — reliable under concurrent factory floor usage.

skills.name: Python
skills.desc: Scripting, automation, and data processing — used alongside the TypeScript stack for backend tooling and integrations.

skills.name: Git
skills.desc: Version control for all projects — every change tracked, safe rollbacks, and a clean history for solo and collaborative work.

skills.name: Figma
skills.desc: UI design and wireframing before implementation — used to prototype ERP operator screens and management interfaces.
